nodes.label: D3.js力导向图
nodes.summary: JavaScript数据可视化库(d3.v7)，用于渲染知识/认知图谱。力导向布局，节点按类型着色，支持拖拽缩放点击详情。
nodes.wiki_description: D3.js is a JavaScript library for producing dynamic, interactive data visualizations in web browsers. It uses SVG, HTML5, and CSS standards. Force-directed graphs are one of its most popular applications.
nodes.baidu_description: D3.js 是由 Mike Bostock 开发的 JavaScript 数据可视化库，使用 SVG/HTML5/CSS 标准渲染。力导向图是其最常见的应用之一，版本 v7 为最新稳定版。

nodes.label: RK3568+RTT嵌入式项目
nodes.summary: 瑞芯微RK3568(Cortex-A55,Mali-G52,NPU,PCIE,GMAC)搭配RTT实时系统。AD7606驱动开发(D:\1_RK3568\Code\TEST_RK3568_RTT_LT\hal)。角色设定：入行20年老手。
nodes.wiki_description: The RK3568 is a Rockchip SoC featuring a quad-core ARM Cortex-A55 CPU, Mali-G52 GPU, and an NPU (Neural Processing Unit) delivering 0.8 TOPS. It supports PCIe, GMAC (Gigabit Ethernet), and SARADC interfaces, making it suitable for embedded AI and industrial control applications.

nodes.label: 认知偏差体系
nodes.summary: 200+认知偏差知识库：确认偏误、锚定效应、规划谬误、后见之明、自利偏差、达克效应、沉没成本、现状偏误、框架效应等。用于元认知对照分析。
nodes.wiki_description: Cognitive biases are systematic patterns of deviation from norm or rationality in judgment. The cognitive bias codex catalogs over 200 known biases including confirmation bias, anchoring effect, planning fallacy, and Dunning-Kruger effect.
nodes.baidu_description: 认知偏差是判断中系统性地偏离规范或理性的模式。认知偏差体系收录了 200+ 已知偏差，包括确认偏误、锚定效应、规划谬误、达克效应、沉没成本、现状偏误等。

nodes.label: PyInstaller打包
nodes.summary: Python→Windows EXE打包技术。命令：python -m PyInstaller --onefile。v6.20.0。注意GBK终端emoji编码问题。
nodes.wiki_description: PyInstaller bundles a Python application and all its dependencies into a single executable package. It supports Windows, macOS, and Linux, with onefile mode creating a single EXE file.
nodes.baidu_description: PyInstaller 是将 Python 脚本打包为独立可执行文件（EXE）的工具，支持 Windows/macOS/Linux 平台。命令：python -m PyInstaller --onefile --console --name app script.py。

nodes.label: STM32嵌入式开发
nodes.summary: STM32微控制器开发，⁸⁰提及。核心外设：GPIO/TIM/USART/DMA/NVIC。使用HAL库和CubeMX配置工具。
nodes.wiki_description: STM32 is a family of 32-bit microcontroller integrated circuits by STMicroelectronics, based on ARM Cortex-M processors. It offers a wide range of peripherals including GPIO, timers, USART, SPI, I2C, ADC, and DMA. Development is supported by the HAL (Hardware Abstraction Layer) library and STM32CubeMX graphical configuration tool.

nodes.label: SPI通信协议
nodes.summary: Serial Peripheral Interface，全双工同步串行通信。四线制：MOSI(主出从入)/MISO(主入从出)/SCLK(时钟)/CS(片选)。支持多从机菊花链或独立片选。¹⁴⁷²提及CS，⁴⁸⁷SCLK。
nodes.wiki_description: Serial Peripheral Interface (SPI) is a synchronous serial communication interface specification used for short-distance communication, primarily in embedded systems. Developed by Motorola in the 1980s, it uses a master-slave architecture with four logic signals: SCLK (clock), MOSI (master out slave in), MISO (master in slave out), and CS (chip select). It supports full-duplex communication at speeds up to tens of MHz.

nodes.label: AD模数转换
nodes.summary: Analog-to-Digital Conversion，模拟转数字。关键参数：采样率、分辨率(²⁵⁰)、参考电压(⁸)、SNR。AD7606是8通道同步采样ADC，⁸²⁷提及。
nodes.wiki_description: Analog-to-digital conversion (ADC) is the process of converting continuous analog signals into discrete digital numbers. Key parameters include sampling rate (Nyquist theorem: fs >= 2*fmax), resolution (bits), and reference voltage. AD7606 is an 8-channel simultaneous-sampling 16-bit ADC from Analog Devices, supporting true bipolar input ranges and sampling up to 200 kSPS.

nodes.label: Linux嵌入式
nodes.summary: 嵌入式Linux开发：内核配置、设备树(Device Tree)、驱动框架、Buildroot/Yocto构建。与RTOS互补：Linux复杂应用层，RTOS实时控制层。
nodes.wiki_description: Embedded Linux refers to the use of the Linux kernel in embedded systems. It involves kernel configuration, Device Tree (hardware description), driver frameworks, and build systems like Buildroot or Yocto. It complements RTOS by handling complex application-layer tasks while RTOS manages real-time control.

nodes.label: GPIO编程
nodes.summary: 通用输入输出接口。模式：输入(¹⁷³)/输出(²⁰¹)/复用功能(¹¹²)。电路：推挽(⁶⁹)/开漏(⁴²)。中断：上升沿/下降沿(⁸⁰)。²⁵⁴⁶提及中断。
nodes.wiki_description: General-Purpose Input/Output (GPIO) pins are digital signal pins on integrated circuits that can be configured as input or output. They support various modes including push-pull, open-drain, and alternate function. GPIO pins can generate interrupts on rising, falling, or both edges, making them essential for button inputs, sensor triggers, and peripheral control.

nodes.label: I2C通信协议
nodes.summary: 集成电路间总线，双线制(SCL ⁷⁰⁹/SDA ²³⁹)同步半双工。起始/停止条件(19/¹⁵)。7位(¹³)/10位(²¹)寻址。标准/快速(³⁷)/高速模式。上拉电阻¹³⁹。
nodes.wiki_description: I2C (Inter-Integrated Circuit) is a synchronous, multi-master/multi-slave, packet-switched serial communication bus invented by Philips Semiconductor (now NXP) in 1982. It uses two bidirectional open-drain lines: SCL (Serial Clock) and SDA (Serial Data), with pull-up resistors. Standard speeds range from 100 kbps (standard mode) to 3.4 Mbps (high-speed mode).

nodes.label: FreeRTOS
nodes.summary: 开源实时操作系统内核。任务管理(¹²⁶⁶)、优先级(⁶⁰⁸)、抢占式调度(¹⁸⁴)、时间片(⁶⁴)。IPC：队列(¹³⁵)/信号量(⁴⁰⁹)/互斥量(¹⁷)/任务通知(²)。软件定时器²⁴。
nodes.wiki_description: FreeRTOS is an open-source real-time operating system kernel for embedded devices, distributed under the MIT license. Developed by Real Time Engineers Ltd and now maintained by Amazon Web Services, it supports preemptive and cooperative multitasking, queues, semaphores, mutexes, and software timers across over 40 microcontroller architectures.

nodes.label: DMA传输
nodes.summary: 直接存储器访问。STM32中使用³⁵⁶⁶。FIFO ⁶²¹，burst模式³³⁰，双缓冲²⁹。模式：内存到外设(⁵)/外设到内存(⁶)/循环(⁴)。用于ADC高速采样。
nodes.wiki_description: Direct Memory Access (DMA) is a feature that allows hardware subsystems to access main system memory independently of the CPU. DMA controllers transfer data between peripherals and memory or between memory regions, using FIFO buffers, burst transfers, and double-buffering modes to maximize throughput without CPU intervention.

nodes.label: Python编程
nodes.summary: Python脚本开发。从基础语法(2025-02)到自动化脚本(2026-06)。涉及：文件I/O、JSON处理、HTTP请求、编码处理(GBK/UTF-8)。
nodes.wiki_description: Python is a high-level, interpreted programming language created by Guido van Rossum (1991). Known for its readability and extensive standard library, it is widely used for automation, data processing, and tool development. In embedded contexts, it is often used for build scripts and testing tools.

nodes.label: C/C++编程
nodes.summary: 嵌入式核心语言。C用于底层驱动(寄存器操作、中断)，C++用于应用层(面向对象)。RK3568 RTT项目和STM32项目均有实践。
nodes.wiki_description: C is a general-purpose programming language developed by Dennis Ritchie at Bell Labs (1972). It provides low-level memory access and is widely used in embedded systems. C++ extends C with object-oriented features. Both are essential for microcontroller firmware and driver development.

nodes.label: 嵌入式驱动开发
nodes.summary: 外设驱动综合技能：ADC/SPI/I2C/DMA/GPIO 全协议栈。在RTT框架下实现，涉及HAL层调用。20年经验，代码审查'只读不改'。
nodes.wiki_description: Embedded driver development involves writing software that enables the operating system to communicate with hardware peripherals. Key areas include ADC drivers (AD7606), SPI/I2C protocol drivers, GPIO configuration, DMA optimization, and interrupt handling, typically implemented within an RTOS framework.

nodes.label: 实时系统RTOS
nodes.summary: 实时操作系统概念。双RTOS：RTT(⁶³，国产，组件丰富)和FreeRTOS(²⁸，轻量级)。核心：任务调度、中断管理、IPC、内存管理。
nodes.wiki_description: A Real-Time Operating System (RTOS) is an operating system intended to serve real-time applications that process data as it comes in, typically without buffer delays. Key features include deterministic task scheduling, interrupt management, inter-task communication (IPC), and priority-based preemption. RTT (RT-Thread) and FreeRTOS are two popular RTOS implementations.

nodes.label: SPI:时钟极性与相位
nodes.summary: CPOL(时钟极性²⁰⁶)：决定空闲时SCLK电平(0=低/1=高)。CPHA(时钟相位¹⁹³)：决定数据采样边沿(0=第一边沿/1=第二边沿)。组合产生模式0/1/2/3四种工作模式(模式0:⁴⁶,模式3:¹⁰)。主从双方必须一致。

nodes.label: SPI:片选与主从架构
nodes.summary: CS(片选¹⁴⁷²)：低电平有效，每个从机独立CS。MOSI(¹²⁴)：主出从入数据线。MISO(¹¹⁶)：主入从出数据线。菊花链拓扑(²)：从机串联，共用一个CS。全双工通信(⁶⁵)。

nodes.label: I2C:电气与寻址
nodes.summary: SCL(⁷⁰⁹)/SDA(²³⁹)双线开漏架构(⁴²)，需上拉电阻(¹³⁹)。起始条件(SDA下降沿,¹⁹)/停止条件(SDA上升沿,¹⁵)。7位地址(¹³)可寻址127设备，10位地址(²¹)扩展模式。

nodes.label: I2C:速率模式
nodes.summary: 标准模式：100kbps。快速模式(³⁷)：400kbps。高速模式(³)：3.4Mbps。速率由SCL频率决定，受上拉电阻和总线电容限制。

nodes.label: GPIO:中断系统
nodes.summary: GPIO中断(²⁵⁴⁶)：上升沿(⁸⁰)/下降沿触发。NVIC(⁴¹⁷)嵌套向量中断控制器管理优先级。EXTI线连接GPIO到NVIC。中断处理需去抖动。

nodes.label: GPIO:输出配置
nodes.summary: 推挽输出(⁶⁹)：高低电平均可驱动，最常见。开漏输出(⁴²)：仅低电平驱动，高电平需上拉，适合I2C/电平转换。复用功能模式(¹¹²)：外设接管GPIO。

nodes.label: AD:AD7606特性
nodes.summary: 8通道同步采样ADC(⁸²⁷)。真双极性输入±10V/±5V。16位分辨率。200kSPS采样率。SPI/并行接口。内置2.5V参考电压(参考电压⁸)。过采样(⁶¹)提高分辨率。同步采样(²¹)消除通道间相位差。

nodes.label: AD:采样参数
nodes.summary: 采样率：奈奎斯特采样定理(fs≥2fmax)。分辨率(²⁵⁰)：位数越高精度越高(16位=65536级)。量化噪声：LSB/2。参考电压(⁸)：决定输入范围。过采样(⁶¹)：N倍过采样可提高log4(N)位分辨率。

nodes.label: FreeRTOS:任务管理
nodes.summary: 任务(¹²⁶⁶)是基本执行单元。优先级(⁶⁰⁸)：0~(configMAX_PRIORITIES-1)，高优先级抢占低优先级(¹⁸⁴)。时间片轮转(⁶⁴)：同优先级任务轮流执行。vTaskDelay(¹²)延时。

nodes.label: FreeRTOS:IPC机制
nodes.summary: 队列(¹³⁵)：任务间数据传递，支持超时。二值信号量(⁴⁰⁹)：同步/互斥，take/give操作。互斥量(¹⁷)：优先级继承防反转。任务通知(²)：轻量级替代，无需独立对象。

nodes.label: RTT:内核机制
nodes.summary: 线程(¹⁰²⁹)：RTT基本调度单元。信号量(⁴⁰⁹)/消息队列(²¹)/邮箱(¹³⁴)/事件(⁴⁹⁶)：多种IPC。组件(¹⁵⁰)系统：设备驱动框架(¹²⁸)/DFS(⁷⁶)/Finsh shell(⁶⁴)/ENV配置(¹⁰⁵)。

nodes.label: STM32:HAL库与CubeMX
nodes.summary: HAL(³⁵¹⁰)：硬件抽象层，STM32标准开发库。封装外设操作为统一API。CubeMX(⁵⁶)：图形化配置工具，生成初始化代码和引脚配置。

nodes.label: STM32:外设体系
nodes.summary: TIM(²⁵⁴³)：定时器，PWM/输入捕获/编码器。USART(¹⁰⁶¹)：串口通信。DMA(³⁵⁶⁶)：数据传输协处理器。NVIC(⁴¹⁷)：中断管理。GPIO(²⁷²⁷)：最常用外设。

nodes.label: DMA:传输模式
nodes.summary: FIFO(⁶²¹)：数据缓冲队列，减少CPU干预。Burst(³³⁰)：批量传输，提高吞吐。双缓冲(²⁹)：交替使用两个缓冲区。循环模式(⁴)：自动重载，用于连续ADC采样。

nodes.label: RK3568:芯片架构
nodes.summary: Cortex-A55(¹⁴)：四核64位ARM CPU。Mali-G52(²)：GPU。NPU(⁵⁵¹)：神经网络加速单元，0.8TOPS。PCIE(¹⁰²)：高速外设接口。GMAC(³⁰)：千兆以太网。SARADC(¹⁸)：逐次逼近ADC。

nodes.label: Obsidian知识管理
nodes.summary:
【本质】基于本地Markdown文件的知识管理软件，支持双向链接和图谱视图，可用于个人知识网络构建。
【关键参数】平台: Windows/Mac/Linux/mobile；存储: 本地Markdown文件；核心功能: 双向链接、图谱视图、插件生态、每日笔记。
【项目关联】被问及但未采用——用户选择自建元认知蒸馏方案替代，体现了'先查后建'策略和自建偏好。

nodes.label: clean_garbled.py
nodes.summary:
【本质】批量JSON乱码检测修复工具，过滤Unicode控制字符和替换字符，确保图谱数据在序列化/渲染时不出现乱码。
【关键参数】语言: Python；核心函数: safe_str()过滤C1控制字符(0x80-0x9F)和替换字符(\ufffd)；输入: JSON图谱文件；输出: 清洗后的JSON。
【项目关联】metacog-system核心工具链组件，与build_final_html.py配合构成防乱码管线。

nodes.label: 编码调试经验
nodes.summary:
【本质】系统性的编码问题排查和修复技能——从Unicode控制字符过滤到CJK字体栈配置到HTML innerHTML安全清洗的全链路知识。
【关键参数】问题域: JSON编码、HTML渲染、SVG字体、DOM安全；关键技术: safe_str()过滤、字体栈PingFang SC+Microsoft YaHei、word-break防溢出。
【项目关联】本次调试会话的核心产出——乱码→逐层排查→根因分析→生成clean_garbled.py→更新build_final_html.py防乱码管线。

nodes.label: 项目持久化迁移
nodes.summary:
【本质】将AI辅助开发项目从临时/混乱路径迁移到固定、有结构的持久化目录的工程实践。
【关键参数】迁移路径: C盘临时workspace→D:/github/RK3568...→D:/ai项目/metacog-distiller；关键原则: 统一目录、文件分类(log/json/py/html)、路径可预测。
【项目关联】整个metacog-system的基础设施决策——从散落文件到有组织的项目结构，支撑自动化管道运行。

nodes.label: 自动化蒸馏管道
nodes.summary:
【本质】将元认知/知识/学习三维蒸馏自动化的全链路管道——从日志读取到图谱更新到HTML生成，全部由automation定时触发。
【关键参数】周期: 每4小时；组件: observation_log.md→metacog_graph.json→metacognition-mapper.html + knowledge_log.md→knowledge_graph.json→knowledge-mapper.html + deepseek_export.json→learning_graph.json→learning-mapper.html。
【项目关联】metacog-system的核心价值——将手动蒸馏转化为自动化管道，实现真正的set-and-forget。

edges.label: 编码调试用于HTML安全渲染
自动化管道依赖持久化路径
